calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order 1. Compelling Defendant Simone Santos Cunha To Appear And Testify At Deposition And Produce Request Documents; 2. Compelling Defendant Min Jin Zhao To Appear And Testify At Deposition And Produce Request Documents; 3. To Pay Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ronald Peoples, Esq. of Danfoura Law PC, Tel. 415.970.8012, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

Plaintiff's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel asked for clarification regarding their request for monetary sanctions. The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CLECIANE BATISTA's Motion For Order 1. Compelling Defendant Simone Santos Cunha To Appear And Testify At Deposition And Produce Request Documents; 2. Compelling Defendant Min Jin Zhao To Appear And Testify At Deposition And Produce Request Documents; 3. To Pay Monetary Sanctions as follows:

The Motion was unopposed and is therefore granted. The requested depositions and document productions are ordered to take place within 10 days of the date of notice of entry of this order, good cause appearing under the circumstances to continue the non-expert discovery cut-off for this discovery only. Counsel is advised to review the requirements of SF Local Rule 2.7B and to provide courtesy copies of any future motions, pursuant to that rule.

Request for sanctions is denied. Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: David M. Helbraun; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2017 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order: (1) Compelling Defendant Portfolio Consulting, Inc. To Provide Their Pmk To Appear And Testify At Deposition; (2) Compelling Defendant Portfolio Consulting, Inc.'S Ceo You Guo To Appear And Testify At Deposition; (3) Compelling Defendant Portfolio Consulting, Inc'S Cfo Richard Zhao To Appear And Testify At Deposition; And (4) To Pay Monetary Sanctions.
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No Appearances: The Court Modified it's tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CLECIANE BATISTA'S Motion For Order: (1) Compelling Defendant Portfolio Consulting, Inc. To Provide Their PMK To Appear And Testify At Deposition; (2) Compelling Defendant Portfolio Consulting, Inc.'s CEO You Guo To Appear And Testify At Deposition; (3) Compelling Defendant Portfolio Consulting, Inc's CFO Richard Zhao To Appear And Testify At Deposition; And (4) To Pay Monetary Sanctions is vacated. The matter is off calendar for pending settlement. Judge Pro Tem Thomas Cohen, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jose Mendoza of Carlson Law Group, Inc. telephone number 818-996-7800 appeared by telephone for Defendant California Standard, Inc. dba United Realty Group.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STANDARDS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT as to the sixth cause of action for negligent infliction of emotional distress is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.
